title: How Senior Engineers Actually Build with AI in 2026 | Build a Full Stack Job Applications Platform
summary: JavaScript Mastery demonstrates JobPilot, a full-stack job application platform built with AI agents in 2026. The project showcases the workflow of using nine context files and five open-source agent skills to ship production systems while preventing agent drift.
